llm_verdict.message:
</tool_call> XML tags? The description says: Function calls MUST follow the specified format: an inner <function=...></function> block must be nested within <tool_call></tool_call> XML tags.

Thus we need to output XML-like: 

<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>

Probably need exactly that.

Let's produce:

<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>

Make sure no extra text.


<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>
Install nss-tools package using dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
dnf install -y nss-tools
</parameter>
</function>
